languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

languages.text: "Что есть шутка, кроме как не намеренное искажение смысла в угоду комическому эффекту? Вспомните наши диспуты, леди-навигатор. Пестрота оттенков лишь фикция, призванная отвлечь ваше внимание от истины".

"What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."
languages.original_text: "Что есть шутка, кроме как не намеренное искажение смысла в угоду комическому эффекту? Вспомните наши диспуты, леди-навигатор. Пестрота оттенков лишь фикция, призванная отвлечь ваше внимание от истины".

"What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

"What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

languages.text: «¿Qué es una broma, sino una distorsión deliberada del significado para generar un efecto cómico? Recuerde nuestros debates, lady Navegante. El surtido de colores no es más que una ficción para distraer su atención de la verdad».
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué es una broma, sino una distorsión deliberada del significado para generar un efecto cómico? Recuerde nuestros debates, lady Navegante. El surtido de colores no es más que una ficción para distraer su atención de la verdad».

languages.text: 「冗談とは、滑稽な効果を狙った意味の意図的な歪曲にほかならぬのでは？ 我々の論争を思い出してください、ナビゲーター殿。色とりどりの色彩は、あなたの注意を真実からそらすために仕組まれた虚構にすぎません」
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

traits.locale_text: 「冗談とは、滑稽な効果を狙った意味の意図的な歪曲にほかならぬのでは？ 我々の論争を思い出してください、ナビゲーター殿。色とりどりの色彩は、あなたの注意を真実からそらすために仕組まれた虚構にすぎません」

languages.text: “所谓笑话，无非是为达到喜剧效果而对意义的刻意扭曲罢了。回想一下我们的辩论，导航者女士。斑斓的色彩仅仅是一种虚构，旨在转移你对真相的注意。”
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

traits.locale_text: “所谓笑话，无非是为达到喜剧效果而对意义的刻意扭曲罢了。回想一下我们的辩论，导航者女士。斑斓的色彩仅仅是一种虚构，旨在转移你对真相的注意。”

languages.text: "Ist das ein Witz oder eine bewusste Verdrehung der Bedeutung? Erinnert Euch an unsere Disputationen , Lady Navigator. Verschiedene Farbtöne sind nur ein Mittel, Eure Aufmerksamkeit von der Wahrheit abzulenken."
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

traits.locale_text: "Ist das ein Witz oder eine bewusste Verdrehung der Bedeutung? Erinnert Euch an unsere Disputationen , Lady Navigator. Verschiedene Farbtöne sind nur ein Mittel, Eure Aufmerksamkeit von der Wahrheit abzulenken."

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce qu'une plaisanterie, sinon une distorsion délibérée du sens dans le but de produire un effet comique ? Souvenez-vous de notre débat, dame navigatrice. Les nuances ne sont qu'une fiction dont le but est de vous détourner de la vérité. »
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce qu'une plaisanterie, sinon une distorsion délibérée du sens dans le but de produire un effet comique ? Souvenez-vous de notre débat, dame navigatrice. Les nuances ne sont qu'une fiction dont le but est de vous détourner de la vérité. »

languages.text: "Şaka dediğin, komik bir etki yaratmak için anlamın kasıtlı olarak çarpıtılmasından başka nedir ki? Tartışmalarımızı hatırlayın Leydi Rotacı. Renklerin alacası, dikkatinizi gerçekten uzaklaştırmak için tasarlanmış bir kurgudan ibarettir."
languages.original_text: "What is a joke, but a deliberate distortion of meaning for comic effect? Recall our disputations, Lady Navigator. The motley of hues is merely a fiction intended to divert your attention away from the truth."
